experience_range.note: explicitly stated as a range, not a requirement; strong candidates outside band still considered

narrative.rule: pure research/academic background with no production deployment
AI experience under 12 months built only on LangChain+OpenAI, with no pre-LLM ML production experience
senior engineer who hasn't written production code in 18+ months due to architecture/tech-lead drift
career trajectory shows title-chasing via company-hopping every ~1.5 years
GitHub/portfolio consists of framework tutorials rather than systems work
entire career at consulting firms with no product-company experience
narrative.exception: current employment at one of these is fine if prior product-company experience exists

narrative.rule: primary background in CV/speech/robotics without significant NLP/IR exposure
5+ years entirely closed-source with no external validation (papers, talks, OSS)

education_requirements.evidence: "Skills are teachable; the rest mostly isn't" — no degree/field requirement mentioned anywhere

logistics.remote_policy: hybrid, flexible cadence, quarterly offsite travel expected

notice_period.note: 30+ days still in scope, bar gets higher

culture_signals: values 3+ year commitment, explicitly anti title-chasing
ideal_candidate_narrative: 6-8 years total, 4-5 in applied ML/AI at product companies (not pure services); has shipped an end-to-end ranking/search/recommendation system to real users at meaningful scale; holds and can defend opinions on hybrid-vs-dense retrieval, offline-vs-online evaluation, and fine-tune-vs-prompt decisions; located in or willing to relocate to Noida/Pune; active on-platform or clearly job-seeking.

positive.profile: no 'RAG' or 'Pinecone' in text, but career history shows building a recommendation system at a product company

negative.profile: skills list has every AI keyword, but title is 'Marketing Manager'

behavioral_overrides.rule: perfect-on-paper candidate inactive 6+ months with ~5% recruiter response rate should be down-weighted for availability regardless of fit score
